narrative:
Cols 41-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 851 registered voters, with 89.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 2.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.2 percentage points.
